title.en: China-to-El Salvador BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入萨尔瓦多：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入薩爾瓦多：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against El Salvador OSARTEC/OSN product conformity requirements, SIGET grid-connection and energy-sector authorisations, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards expected in project specifications, local fire-safety installation requirements (Cuerpo de Bomberos / building authority), UN 38.3 transport requirements at port Acajutla, and El Salvador's 60 Hz / 120–240 V grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines. Covers El Salvador's participation in the SIEPAC Central American regional grid interconnection and its emerging BESS regulatory landscape.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与萨尔瓦多OSARTEC/OSN产品合格评定要求、SIGET并网和能源行业授权、项目规格中预期引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、当地消防安全安装要求（消防局/建筑主管机关）、亚卡胡卡港UN 38.3运输要求及萨尔瓦多60 Hz / 120–240 V电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。涵盖萨尔瓦多参与SIEPAC中美洲区域电网互联及其新兴BESS监管格局。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與薩爾瓦多OSARTEC/OSN產品合格評定要求、SIGET併網和能源行業授權、項目規格中預期引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、當地消防安全安裝要求（消防局/建築主管機關）、亞卡胡卡港UN 38.3運輸要求及薩爾瓦多60 Hz / 120–240 V電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。涵蓋薩爾瓦多參與SIEPAC中美洲區域電網互聯及其新興BESS監管格局。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, OSARTEC/OSN conformity scope determination, SIGET grid-connection or energy-sector approval, CNE policy determination, Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current El Salvador OSARTEC/OSN technical regulations, SIGET grid-connection technical specifications and energy-sector authorisation requirements, CNE policy requirements, Cuerpo de Bomberos and building-authority fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、OSARTEC/OSN合格评定范围裁定、SIGET并网或能源行业审批、CNE政策裁定、消防局消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行萨尔瓦多OSARTEC/OSN技术法规、SIGET并网技术规格和能源行业授权要求、CNE政策要求、消防局和建筑主管机关消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、OSARTEC/OSN合格評定範圍裁定、SIGET併網或能源行業審批、CNE政策裁定、消防局消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行薩爾瓦多OSARTEC/OSN技術法規、SIGET併網技術規格和能源行業授權要求、CNE政策要求、消防局和建築主管機關消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: El Salvador does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or Saudi SABER/IEC 62619 route. BESS installations in El Salvador operate under SIGET's energy-sector authorisation framework, project-specific international standards, and OSARTEC/OSN conformity requirements where applicable. The most critical practical gap for Chinese BESS exported to El Salvador is the grid frequency and voltage difference: El Salvador operates at 60 Hz / 120–240 V (single-phase residential) and 120/240 V or 277/480 V (three-phase commercial/industrial), whereas China operates at 50 Hz / 220–380 V. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) configured for the Chinese 50 Hz grid must be completely re-parameterised and retested for El Salvador's 60 Hz grid — this is a fundamental hardware and firmware reconfiguration requirement, not a paperwork gap. Additional practical gaps are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in SIGET or project-owner specifications; (3) fire-safety installation approval from the Cuerpo de Bomberos and local building authority, applying local codes that reference NFPA standards; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions for shipments arriving at port Acajutla; and (5) OSARTEC/OSN conformity assessment for product categories within its regulated scope. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the Chinese manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in project or authority review. El Salvador's small interconnected grid participates in the SIEPAC regional Central American interconnection — installers should verify regional grid-code obligations with SIGET.
answer_first.zh: 萨尔瓦多尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路径相当。萨尔瓦多的BESS装置在SIGET能源行业授权框架、项目专属国际标准及适用的OSARTEC/OSN合格评定要求下运作。中国BESS出口萨尔瓦多最关键的实际差距是电网频率和电压差异：萨尔瓦多运行于60 Hz / 120–240 V（单相住宅）和120/240 V或277/480 V（三相商业/工业），而中国运行于50 Hz / 220–380 V。针对中国50 Hz电网配置的BESS储能变流器（PCS）须完全重新针对萨尔瓦多60 Hz电网进行参数配置和重新测试——这是根本性的硬件和固件重新配置要求，而非文件差距。其他实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准；（2）SIGET或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）消防局和地方建筑主管机关的消防安全安装审批，适用引用NFPA标准的当地规范；（4）到达亚卡胡卡港的货物须依据国际运输公约强制要求提供UN 38.3运输测试文件；（5）OSARTEC/OSN对其监管范围内产品类别的合格评定。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是中国生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。萨尔瓦多的小型互联电网参与SIEPAC中美洲区域互联——安装方应向SIGET核实区域电网规范义务。
answer_first.zht: 薩爾瓦多尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或沙特SABER/IEC 62619路徑相當。薩爾瓦多的BESS裝置在SIGET能源行業授權框架、項目專屬國際標準及適用的OSARTEC/OSN合格評定要求下運作。中國BESS出口薩爾瓦多最關鍵的實際差距是電網頻率和電壓差異：薩爾瓦多運行於60 Hz / 120–240 V（單相住宅）和120/240 V或277/480 V（三相商業/工業），而中國運行於50 Hz / 220–380 V。針對中國50 Hz電網配置的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須完全重新針對薩爾瓦多60 Hz電網進行參數配置和重新測試——這是根本性的硬件和韌體重新配置要求，而非文件差距。其他實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準；（2）SIGET或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）消防局和地方建築主管機關的消防安全安裝審批，適用引用NFPA標準的當地規範；（4）到達亞卡胡卡港的貨物須依據國際運輸公約強制要求提供UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（5）OSARTEC/OSN對其監管範圍內產品類別的合格評定。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是中國製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。薩爾瓦多的小型互聯電網參與SIEPAC中美洲區域互聯——安裝方應向SIGET核實區域電網規範義務。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
